name: 7-Zip
description: Free, open-source archive utility for Windows. Compresses and extracts ZIP, RAR, 7z, tar, ISO, and many more formats.

name: Audacity
description: Free, open-source audio editor for recording, trimming, mixing, and mastering audio files. Supports VST plugins.

name: FileHippo
description: Safe, verified Windows software downloads. Browse thousands of apps with version history and clean installers.

name: GIMP
description: Free and open-source image editor with layer support, filters, and scripting. A capable alternative to Adobe Photoshop.

name: Ninite
description: Install and update multiple Windows apps in one click with no toolbars or junk. The fastest way to set up a new PC.

name: OBS
description: Industry-standard open-source streaming and recording software. Supports scenes, overlays, and multiple output formats.

name: Speedtest
description: Test your internet connection's download, upload, and ping speeds against servers worldwide. Free and instant.

name: VLC
description: Free, open-source media player that plays virtually any video or audio format. Lightweight, cross-platform, no codecs needed.
